psutil>=5.9.0
numpy>=1.21.0
pandas>=1.3.0

# For semantic similarity (vector operations)

faiss-cpu>=1.7.0

# For LLM (Claude)

# For embeddings (fallback)
langchain-community>=0.0.20  # For HuggingFace embeddings wrapper

# For embeddings
sentence-transformers>=2.2.0
langchain-google-genai>=0.0.5  # Optional: for Google embeddings
langchain-openai>=0.1.0  # Optional: for OpenAI embeddings
transformers>=4.30.0  # Optional: for HuggingFace embeddings
torch>=2.0.0  # Optional: for HuggingFace embeddings

# For persistence and serialization
msgpack>=1.0.0

# For testing
pytest>=7.0.0
pytest-cov>=4.0.0

black>=22.0.0
flake8>=5.0.0
mypy>=1.0.0

# For monitoring and metrics
rich>=12.0.0
